title: CustomCoords
description: Customise your coordinates so they mean something to you!
body:
Coordinates are an essential part of the multiplayer experience. There's no other way to efficiently communicate the location of something to someone who doesn't share your knowledge. This information, being so essential, does not belong in the debug screen, along with information that is either useless or potentially oppositional to a positive user experience. As such, we the community have created a vast number of mods to display your coordinates through other means over the years. This mod's niche in this sea of coord mods is that of customisability, hence its namesake.

Originally being a backend function, coords struggle to hold meaning, especially after the introduction of -64 < y < 0. You can now be in control of that meaning. For example, you can change Y 0 to be sea level, so your Y-coord can communicate where you are regards to it. Importantly, this is only visual, so it doesn't effect how the game operates in the background.

/cc share and automatic chat coord interpretation allows you to communicate with others who don't share the same customisations as you, without any unwarranted confusion.

This mod also comes with integration with [Xaero's minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap), the custom coords are shown in the info display.

This mod is still in development. Please be aware that it may not work as intended. Post any bugs, queries, or gripes to the [Issue page](https://github.com/Hxrlio/CustomCoords/issues).
